message.content:
Subject: Update on Our Plans

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to update you on our recent plans. After careful consideration, I have decided that I will not be able to proceed with the [brief mention of the plan, e.g., "partnership proposal"] at this time.

I truly appreciate your understanding and support. Please let me know if you need any clarification or if there’s any action required on your end.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
